summary.top_action: Upgrade Next.js to 16.2.6 (or 15.5.18) immediately — 7 high-severity security patches released May 7

highlights: HIGH: Denial of Service with Server Components
HIGH: Middleware/Proxy bypass via segment-prefetch routes (2 advisories)
HIGH: Connection exhaustion in Cache Components
HIGH: Dynamic route parameter injection bypass
HIGH: Server-side request forgery with WebSocket upgrades
HIGH: Middleware/Proxy bypass in Pages Router with i18n
MODERATE: XSS with CSP nonces and beforeInteractive scripts
MODERATE: Image Optimization API denial of service
MODERATE: Cache poisoning in React Server Components
LOW: Cache poisoning via collision in cache-busting
LOW: Middleware redirect cache poisoning
releases.action: Run `npm install next@16.2.6` (or `next@15.5.18` if staying on v15) in all repos immediately. This is a security-only patch — no breaking changes.

highlights: New @container-size utility for container queries
Scrollbar styling utilities: scrollbar-{auto,thin,none}, scrollbar-thumb-*, scrollbar-track-*, scrollbar-gutter-*
New zoom-* and tab-* utilities
Enhanced @variant support for stacked and compound variants
Functional @utility definitions now support --default(…) syntax
Fixed @plugin package resolution in Vite builds
Fixed relative import paths in @tailwindcss/vite
releases.action: Update when convenient — no breaking changes, useful new utilities especially scrollbar and container-size.
affects_repos: the-squeeze (on v3 — upgrade to v4 is a separate larger effort)

highlights: React Server Components: type hardening and performance improvements
releases.action: Routine patch — pick up via `npm update react react-dom` at next opportunity.

highlights: Temporal API enabled by default (replaces legacy Date object)
V8 14.6: Map.getOrInsert(), Iterator.concat() proposals
Undici 8.0.2 HTTP client
BREAKING: http.writeHeader() removed (use writeHead())
BREAKING: _stream_* private modules removed
BREAKING: --experimental-transform-types flag removed
BREAKING: GCC 13.2+ required for builds
BREAKING: Python 3.10+ required (drops 3.9)
BREAKING: NODE_MODULE_VERSION bumped to 147 — recompile native modules
BREAKING: module.register() runtime-deprecated
Current LTS: v24.15.0 (Apr 2026); Node 26 enters LTS October 2026
releases.action: Monitor only. Node 26 is 'Current' (not LTS until Oct 2026). Stack targets Node 22+. No action needed until LTS announcement.
affects_repos: all — runtime compatibility check before adopting

highlights: v1.14.0: Added repeat-off icon
v1.13.0: Added waves-vertical icon, doc URL fixes
v1.12.0: Added folder-bookmark and astroid icons
releases.action: Note: all repos on lucide-react v0.x — v1.x is a major bump. Upgrade when doing a broader icon pass. Icon-only changes, no API breaks noted.
